description: Add Chapter 2 (Jenis-Jenis Polimer Organik) to the textbook covering natural polymers (cellulose, starch, chitin, chitosan) and synthetic polymers (plastics, synthetic rubber, Kevlar, Nomex, Nylon, Dacron) with comprehensive scientific content.
steps: Append Chapter 2 to /projects/sandbox/book-gen/buku_kimia_polimer_organik.tex after Chapter 1, before any end-of-document markers

Write Section 2.1 Polimer Alam (Natural Polymers): detailed coverage of cellulose (structure, sources, properties, applications in paper/textiles), starch/pati (amylose vs amylopectin, gelatinization, industrial uses), chitin (structure, sources from crustaceans/fungi, properties), chitosan (deacetylation of chitin, biomedical applications, water treatment)

Write Section 2.2 Polimer Sintetik (Synthetic Polymers): detailed coverage of plastics (PE, PP, PVC, PS, PET - structures, properties, applications), synthetic rubber (SBR, NBR, neoprene - vulcanization, properties), aramid fibers Kevlar and Nomex (para vs meta orientation, hydrogen bonding, thermal/mechanical properties), polyamides Nylon (nylon-6, nylon-6,6 synthesis and properties), polyesters Dacron/PET (condensation synthesis, fiber properties)
Write Section 2.3 Perbandingan Polimer Alam dan Sintetik (comparison table and discussion)
Write Section 2.5 Latihan Soal (10 exercise questions covering both natural and synthetic polymers)
Write Section 2.6 Bahan Diskusi (3-4 discussion topics on polymer selection and sustainability)
Include chemical structures and reaction schemes where appropriate using mhchem or chemfig notation
acceptance_criteria: Chapter 2 is present in the LaTeX file with all specified sections
Natural polymers section covers cellulose, starch, chitin, and chitosan with chemical detail
Synthetic polymers section covers all specified materials with structures and properties
Chemical formulas and reaction mechanisms are included
Content depth is appropriate for university-level chemistry
Exercise questions and discussion materials are fully developed
verification: Read the file and confirm Chapter 2 exists with substantial content in all sections
Confirm chemical structures/formulas are present for the key polymers discussed
findings: Chapter 2 added with 380 lines of content. All sections present: 2.1 Polimer Alam (Selulosa, Pati, Kitin, Kitosan), 2.2 Polimer Sintetik (Plastik, Karet Sintetik, Serat Aramid, Nilon, Dakron/PET), 2.3 Perbandingan (with LaTeX table), 2.4 Rangkuman, 2.5 Latihan Soal (10 questions), 2.6 Bahan Diskusi (4 topics). Chemical formulas use \ce{} throughout. End marker is now '% === BAB 3 AKAN DITAMBAHKAN DI SINI ===' at line 733. File has no \end{document} yet - expected per the incremental build pattern from FEAT-001.
